segments.text: It would have been a good trade.
But because I analyzed this stock, and I talked about this stock during that day itself and many people.
And just before that, I had done a boot camp where I explained EP methodology and explained how to find.
A lot of people found it, and they their hurry entered this stock early in pre market.
And as a result, the gap was very wide, and the gap was very wide.
So there was no money to be made because I expected it to make 50%, and it just capped up around 40%.
So there's no additional money to be made on this particular EP.
